theorem proof_of_goal :
  ∀ (ι : Type) (oSpec : OracleSpec ι) (StmtIn WitIn StmtOut WitOut : Type) (n : ℕ) (pSpec : ProtocolSpec n)
    [∀ (i : pSpec.ChallengeIdx), SampleableType (pSpec.Challenge i)] (σ : Type) (init : ProbComp σ) (impl : QueryImpl oSpec (StateT σ ProbComp))
    (relIn : Set (StmtIn × WitIn)) (relOut : Set (StmtOut × WitOut)) (verifier : Verifier oSpec StmtIn StmtOut pSpec)
    (stF : Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunctionOneShot ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut n pSpec σ init.impl relIn.language relOut.language verifier)
    (oneShotE : Extractor.RoundByRoundOneShot ι oSpec StmtIn WitIn n pSpec)
    (stmtIn : StmtIn) (tr : Transcript (Fin.last n) pSpec) (witOut : WitOut),
    (∃ (x :StmtOut), x ∈ support (verifier.run_simulate init impl stmtIn tr) ∧ (x, witOut) ∈ relOut) →
    (¬if n = 0 then (stmtIn, @Extractor.RoundByRound.extractOut ι oSpecStmtIn WitIn WitOut n pSpec (fun x => WitIn) (Extractor.RoundByRoundOneShot.toRoundByRound ι oSpecStmtIn WitIn WitOut n pSpec oneShotE) stmtIn tr witOut) ∈ relIn else Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunctionOneShot.toFun ι oSpecStmtIn n pSpec σ init.impl relIn.relOut verifier stF (Fin.last n) stmtIn tr ∨ (stmtIn, @oneShotE (Fin.last n) stmtIn tr default) ∈ relIn) →
    (¬Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunctionOneShot.toFun ι oSpecStmtIn n pSpec σ init.impl relIn.relOut verifier stF (Fin.last n) stmtIn tr ∧ ∃ (x :StmtOut) (x_1 : WitOut), x ∈ support (verifier.run_simulate init impl stmtIn tr) ∧ (x, x_1) ∈ relOut) := by
  dsimp only
  intro ι oSpec StmtIn WitIn StmtOut WitOut n pSpec _ σ init impl relIn relOut verifier stF oneShotE stmtIn tr witOut h₁ h₂
  have h₃ : ¬Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunctionOneShot.toFun ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut n pSpec σ init.impl relIn.relOut verifier stF (Fin.last n) stmtIn tr := by
    split_ifs at h₂ <;> simp_all (config := { contextual := true })
    <;>
    (try { contradiction }) <;>
    (try { aesop }) <;>
    (try {
      have h₄ := h₁
      obtain ⟨x, hx₁, hx₂⟩ := h₁
      simp_all [Set.mem_image]
      <;>
      (try { aesop })
    }) <;>
    (try {
      simp_all [Set.mem_image]
      <;>
      (try { aesop })
    })
    <;>
    (try {
      exfalso
      have h₄ := h₁
      obtain ⟨x, hx₁, hx₂⟩ := h₁
      simp_all [Set.mem_image]
      <;>
      (try { aesop })
    })
  have h₄ : ∃ (x : StmtOut) (x_1 : WitOut), x ∈ support (verifier.run_simulate init.impl stmtIn tr) ∧ (x, x_1) ∈ relOut := by
    obtain ⟨x, hx₁, hx₂⟩ := h₁
    exact ⟨x, witOut, hx₁, hx₂⟩
  exact ⟨h₃, h₄⟩

    (relIn : Set (StmtIn × WitIn)) (relOut : Set (StmtOut × WitOut)) (verifier : Verifier oSpec StmtIn StmtOut pSpec)
    (stF : Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunctionOneShot ι oSpecStmtIn n pSpec σ init.impl relIn.relOut verifier)
    (oneShotE : Extractor.RoundByRoundOneShot ι oSpecStmtIn n pSpec)
    (stmtIn : StmtIn) (tr : Transcript (Fin.last n) pSpec) ( witOut : WitOut),
    (∃ (x :StmtOut), x ∈ support (verifier.run_simulate init.impl stmtIn tr) ∧ (x, witOut) ∈ relOut) →
    (¬if n = 0 then (stmtIn, @Extractor.RoundByRound.extractOut ι oSpecStmtIn n pSpec (fun x => WitIn) (Extract.or.roundByRoundOneShot.toRoundByRound ι oSpecStmtIn n pSpec oneShotE) stmtIn tr witOut) ∈ relIn else Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunctionOneShot.toFun ι oSpecStmtIn n pSpec σ init.impl relIn.relOut verifier stF (Fin.last n) stmtIn tr ∨ (stmtIn, @oneShotE (Fin.last n) stmtIn tr default) ∈ relIn) →
    (¬Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunctionOneShot.toFun ι oSpecStmtIn n pSpec σ init.impl relIn.relOut verifier stF (Fin.last n) stmtIn tr ∧ ∃ (x :StmtOut) (x_1 : WitOut), x ∈ support (verifier.run_simulate init.impl stmtIn tr) ∧ (x, x_1) ∈ relOut) := by
  dsimp only
  intro ι oSpec StmtIn WitIn StmtOut WitOut n pSpec _ σ init impl relIn relOut verifier stF oneShotE stmtIn tr witOut h₁ h₂
  have h₃ : ¬Verifier.KnowledgeStateFunctionOneShot.toFun ι oSpecStmtIn n pSpec σ init.impl relIn.relOut verifier stF (Fin.last n) stmtIn tr := by

  exact ⟨h₃, h₄⟩
